title: Law No. 23 of 2018 Health Insurance Law English PDF
summary: Article 23 provides that each beneficiary shall have an electronic medical record containing health data and related data, making the law directly significant for health data governance.

theme_notes.digital_health.health_data: English version confirming unified electronic medical record provisions.

notes: Related instruments: Related to the Arabic official Legal Affairs version of Law No. 23 of 2018
